channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Celebrate Scream’s 30th Anniversary with Marco Beltrami’s Original Score on Vinyl
item.description: 🔊 Dive into horror vibes! Scream turns 30 with a killer vinyl reissue of Marco Beltrami's iconic score. 🎶💿 #Scream30 #VinylRevival

item.title: Post Malone to Perform at the World Cup Closing Ceremony
item.description: 🎉 Posty's bringing the party to the World Cup finale! 🌍🏆 Get ready for a show-stopping performance! 🎶 #PostMalone #WorldCupClosingCeremony

item.title: Imperial Teen announce first tour in six years, including dates with The Breeders
item.description: Imperial Teen hitting the road after six years! 🚗🎶 Catch them jamming with The Breeders on select dates. 🎉 #MusicNews

item.title: Tokyo Police Club frontman fronts new Castle Rat-adjacent “peasant metal” project Netherwilds (!!)
item.description: 🎸 Dive into the wild side with Tokyo Police Club's frontman in his new "peasant metal" project Netherwilds! 🤘 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Meshell Ndegeocello Announces New Duet Covers Album Synonym Feat. Cat Power, Bill Callahan, ANOHNI, & More
item.description: 🎶 Get ready to vibe with Meshell Ndegeocello's collab-filled covers album! 🎤 Which duet are you most excited for? #NewMusicAlert 🎵

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers Plays Surprise Performance of ‘Lost Boys’ on ‘Fallon’
item.description: 🌟 Phoebe Bridgers lights up late night with a surprise 'Lost Boys' performance on Fallon! 🎶✨ #PhoebeOnFallon

item.title: Friendship and Charlotte Cornfield Are Going on Tour Together
item.description: 🎶🚐 Tour buddies alert! Friendship and Charlotte Cornfield are hitting the road together! Who's ready for double the music fun? 🎸🎤 #TourLife

item.title: Lido Pimienta – “Marea”
item.description: 🎶 Dive into the vibrant sounds of @LidoPimienta's latest track "Marea"! 🌊💃 #NewMusicAlert #MusicDiscovery

item.title: Queens of the Stone Age share new single “Easy Street” ft Nikki Lane: watch the wild video
item.description: 🎸 Rock out with Queens of the Stone Age's fierce new single "Easy Street" featuring Nikki Lane! 🤘🎶 Watch the wild video now! #NewMusicAlert 📺

item.title: Thundercat announces tour with Channel Tres, TiaCorine, Fera, 54 Ultra & Kitty Ca$h
item.description: ✨ Thundercat is hitting the road with an awesome lineup! 🎶 Who's ready to groove all night long? 💃 #ThundercatTour2022

item.title: Teyana Taylor Thanks Jay-Z After Performing Together at ‘Iconic’ Yankee Stadium Finale
item.description: 🎤 @TeyanaTaylor giving us major feels with a killer performance alongside Jay-Z at the legendary Yankee Stadium! 🙌🎶 #MusicMagic

item.title: Jack White Performs the White Stripes’ 1999 Track ‘Cannon’ With Daughter Scarlett
item.description: 🎸 Rocking the stage together! Jack White and daughter Scarlett bring the heat with 'Cannon'. 🔥 #FamilyJam #MusicLegends

item.title: Madonna Reflects on ‘Confessions II’ Success: ‘Words Cannot Express How Grateful and Surprised I Am’
item.description: 🌟 Madonna shares her gratitude for ‘Confessions II’ success! 🙌 Let's celebrate the queen of pop! 👑 #Madonna #ConfessionsII #GratefulVibes

item.title: The Linda Lindas Announce 2026 North American Tour
item.description: 🎸✨ Let's rock with The Linda Lindas across North America in 2026! Who's joining the party? 🎶 #TheLindaLindas #2026Tour

item.title: Joyeria – “The Curse”
item.description: Unleashing a wicked new track from Joyeria! 🎶 Get ready to vibe with "The Curse" 🔥 #NewMusicAlert #Joyeria #TheCurse

item.title: Ellie Goulding Performs ‘Lights’ at World Cup Quarterfinal Game
item.description: Ellie Goulding lit up the World Cup with her electrifying performance of ‘Lights’! 🌟⚽️ #WorldCupMusic #EllieGoulding #Lights

item.title: Pitbull Sets Guinness World Record for Largest Gathering of People in Bald Caps
item.description: 🌟 Mr. Worldwide does it again! 🌎🎩 Pitbull breaks records and rocks the bald look in style! 🎉 #Dale #WorldRecordWorthy

item.title: Jack White Joined by Daughter Scarlett White on Bass for Three Songs in Brooklyn
item.description: Father-daughter rockin' duo alert! 🎸🎶 Jack White + Scarlett White = Brooklyn magic! 🔥 #FamilyJam #MusicNews

item.title: AC/DC Kick Off Summer 2026 North American Tour with 21-Song Set of Classics: Video + Setlist
item.description: AC/DC bringing the heat with an epic 21-song setlist to kick off their Summer 2026 North American Tour! 🔥🎸 #RockOn

item.title: See Jay-Z Bring Out Eminem, Pharrell Williams at Yankee Stadium Night Two
item.description: 🔥🚀 Jay-Z takes Yankee Stadium by storm with surprise guests Eminem and Pharrell Williams! Legends unite for an epic night! 🎤🙌 #HipHopRoyalty

item.title: Jay-Z’s Yankee Stadium Night Two Setlist: Every Song Played at the Second Show
item.description: 🎶🔥 Relive the magic of Jay-Z's second night at Yankee Stadium! Which song was your favorite? 🙌 #JayZ #SetlistGoals

item.title: Jimmy Barnes, ICEHOUSE and More Pay Tribute to Cold Chisel Saxophonist Andy Bickers
item.description: Rock legends unite to honor a saxophone hero 🎷🎸 Let the music keep on playing! 🎶 #LegendsNeverDie #MusicTribute

item.title: Squishmallows’ ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Collection Features 4 Fan-Favorite Characters in Plushie Form
item.description: 🎶 Dive into a world of music and magic with Squishmallows' new KPop Demon Hunters collection! Which plushie is your favorite? 🧸✨ #Squishmallows #KPopDemonHunters

item.title: 50 Cent Reacts to His Diddy Documentary Receiving 3 Emmy Noms: ‘You Can’t Argue With the Work’
item.description: 🎉 Major congrats to @50cent on his Diddy documentary scoring 3 Emmy noms! 🏆 Keep killing it! 🔥 #MusicNews #EmmyNoms

item.title: Charli XCX Performs Live Debuts & Rarities, Brings Out Clairo, Underscores, & Kim Petras In Brooklyn
item.description: 🎉 Charli XCX bringing major surprises and vibes in Brooklyn 🌟 Which live debut are you most excited for? #CharliXCX #MusicNews

item.title: Jay-Z’s Yankee Stadium Night One Setlist: Every Song Played at the First Show
item.description: 🔥 Dive into Jay-Z's Yankee Stadium Night One setlist! 🎶 Which song do you think got the crowd the most hyped? #JayZ #SetlistReveal

item.title: Beyoncé Joins JAY-Z for “Reasonable Doubt” at Yankee Stadium: Watch
item.description: 🚀 Queen Bey surprises fans at Yankee Stadium with an epic collaboration! Watch the magic unfold! 👑🎶 #Beyonce #JayZ #MusicMoment

item.title: Pitbull Sets Guinness World Record for Most ‘Bald Caps’ at London Festival
item.description: 🎉 Mr. Worldwide strikes again! Pitbull breaks records at London Festival with bald caps galore! 🌍🏆 #Pitbull #WorldRecord #Dale

item.title: Alabama Shakes Announce First Album in 11 Years
item.description: 🚀 Alabama Shakes are back with a bang! 🎶 Get ready to groove to their first album in over a decade! 🔥 #AlabamaShakes #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Jack White Invites ‘Satanic’ Band Twin Temple to Open for Him
item.description: 🔥 Rock 'n' roll just got a little wicked! Jack White teams up with Twin Temple for a devilishly good time! 🤘 #RockMusic #Collaboration

item.title: Rolling Stones Stage Surprise London Performance
item.description: 🎸 London rocks as Rolling Stones surprise with epic performance! 🎶 #RockLegends #MusicNews

item.title: ANOHNI Covers Selena For Balenciaga
item.description: 🎤 ANOHNI takes on Selena in a fashion-filled musical remix! 🌟 #ANOHNI #Selena #Balenciaga #MusicNews

item.title: Charli XCX playing intimate NYC & London shows this month
item.description: 🌟 Charli's bringing the party to NYC & London! 🎉 Who's ready to dance with @charli_xcx? 🎶 #CharliXCX #LiveMusicVibes

item.title: Spoon Bring Out Hamilton Leithauser, Britt Daniel Joins Bodega In Central Park
item.description: 🎶 Unexpected collabs heating up Central Park! Spoon x Hamilton Leithauser, Britt Daniel x Bodega 🔥 Who's next? #MusicMagic 🌟

item.title: Fred Armisen & Carrie Brownstein Announce Portlandia Rewatch Podcast
item.description: 🎶 Grab your coffee and put a bird on it! Fred and Carrie are back for a Portlandia rewatch podcast! Let the hipster hilarity ensue! 🌟 #PortlandiaRewatchPodcast

item.title: Elanor Moss shares “The Way That It Feels” from new LP, announces fall US tour
item.description: 🎶 Groove into autumn with Elanor Moss! 🍂🎤 Listen to her new track and catch her live on tour across the US! 🎉 #ElanorMoss #NewMusic #FallTour

item.title: Kisser (Germaine Dunes, Buck Meek) share debut single, opening for Buck Meek
item.description: 🎶 Double the Meek, double the fun! Catch Kisser's debut single and get ready for a killer show 🎸 #NewMusic #LiveMusicVibes

item.title: HUG (Devendra Banhart, Gyan Riley & Noah Georgeson) announce debut album & tour, share first single
item.description: 🎉 Get ready to groove with HUG! 🎶 Debut album, tour, and single dropping soon! 🌟 #HUG #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Jonas Brothers Announce Madison Square Garden “Burning Up All Over” Shows
item.description: 🔥💥 Get ready to party with the Jonas Brothers at Madison Square Garden! Who's ready to feel the burn?! 🔥🎶 #JonasBrothers #MSGMadness

item.title: Poppy Kicks Off Headlining North American Summer Tour with 17-Song Set: Video + Setlist
item.description: Poppy brings the 🔥 on her North American tour! 🌟 Check out the epic 17-song setlist. 🎶 #PoppyTourKickoff

item.title: Joe Bonamassa Announces 2027 Winter US Tour
item.description: Pack your bags and grab your air guitar 🎸 Joe Bonamassa is hitting the road for a winter tour! Who's ready to rock? 🤘 #JoeBonamassa #2027Tour

item.title: Jay-Z Adds London Show to International Stadium Tour
item.description: 🌟 London calling! Jay-Z extends tour to the UK capital 🎤 Who's ready to rock with the legend? 🇬🇧 #JayZ #LondonShow

item.title: Rico Nasty announces headlining tour
item.description: 🌟 Ready to rock with @Rico_nasty on her headlining tour! 🎤 Who's snagging tickets? 🎸 #RicoNastyTour20

item.title: New supergroup ft. Billie Joe Armstrong, Travis Barker, Tim Armstrong, more covering Ramones at tribute show
item.description: 🎸 Get ready to rock out as music legends unite to pay tribute to the Ramones! Can't wait to see this epic supergroup in action! 🤘🤩 #MusicLegends #TributeShow

item.title: King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard announce NYC rave show at Under the K Bridge Park
item.description: 🦎 NYC is about to get a whole lot groovier 🎶 King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard are bringing the party to Under the K Bridge Park! 🌟 #MusicNews #NYCConcerts

item.title: Abbey Road Institute to Launch New Production-School Campus in Los Angeles
item.description: 🌟 LA vibes meet music magic! 🎶 Abbey Road Institute is heading to Los Angeles with a new production-school campus! 🌴✨ #musicnews #excitingexpansion

item.title: Jazz Supergroup Dinner Party Announces New Album Watchu Bringing?
item.description: 🎶 Get those taste buds and ears ready, folks! Jazz supergroup Dinner Party is cooking up a new album! What's your musical potluck contribution? 🍽️ #DinnerPartyJams

item.title: Tori Amos to Kick Off “In Times of Dragons” North American Tour
item.description: 🐉✨ Ready to be enchanted? Join Tori Amos on her magical "In Times of Dragons" North American Tour! 🎶 #ToriAmos #MusicMagic

item.title: Holy Wave – “i’m DADA”
item.description: 🌀 Dive into the dreamy vibes of Holy Wave's new track "i'm DADA" 🌊 Let the psychedelic sounds take you on a musical journey! 🎶 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Harry Styles’ ‘Together, Together’ Residency Sets New Guinness World Record
item.description: 🌟 Harry Styles is breaking records! 🎉🎶 Let's celebrate his epic residency achievement! 🌈💫 #HarryStyles #RecordBreaker

item.title: Muse Rock Through Power Outage In 24-Song Set Kicking Off 2026 North American Tour
item.description: When the power goes out, Muse keeps rocking! 🎸🔥 Ready for their epic 24-song set on the 2026 North American Tour! #MuseMondays

item.title: Julian Casablancas Expands on “White Privileged” “American Zionists” Comments in Oxford Speech
item.description: Julian Casablancas gets real in Oxford speech 🎤🔥 Let's dive into the discussion! #JulianCasablancas #MusicNews

item.title: Paul McCartney Played Beatles Classic for First Time Since 1964 at Taylor Swift’s Wedding
item.description: 🎶 Legendary vibes at Taylor Swift's wedding as Paul McCartney dusts off a classic! Feeling the music history! 🎸 #PaulMcCartney #TaylorSwift #BeatlesRevival

item.title: Jodie Foster Assumed Brad Pitt’s F1 Was Made with AI: “Wasn’t it?”
item.description: 😂 When Jodie Foster thought Brad Pitt's F1 car was AI-made 🤖🏎️ #MusicGossip

item.title: New Fiona Apple Song Soundtracks Title Sequence For Anya Taylor-Joy Miniseries Lucky
item.description: 🎵 Grooving to Fiona Apple's new track in the Lucky miniseries title sequence! Hit play and feel the vibes. 🌟 #MusicNews #FionaApple #LuckyMiniseries 🎬

item.title: JENNIE Debuts Unreleased Songs at Open’er Festival, Teases New Music ‘Soon’
item.description: JENNIE wowed fans at Open'er Festival with 🔥 unreleased tracks and tantalizing hints of new music on the horizon! 🎶✨ #JENNIE #NewMusicTease

item.title: YoungBoy Never Broke Again’s ‘AMERICAN YOUNGBOY’ Concert Film Arrives on Prime Video
item.description: 🎥 YoungBoy Never Broke Again takes the stage on Prime Video! 🎤 Tune in for a front row seat to 'AMERICAN YOUNGBOY' 🚀 #YoungBoyNeverBrokeAgain #NewRelease

item.title: Sharon Osbourne Marks First Wedding Anniversary Without Ozzy: ‘Forever My Heart’
item.description: Rock royalty Sharon Osbourne celebrates love and resilience on first anniversary without Ozzy! 🤘💖 #powercouple #forevermyheart

item.title: Live shows, pitch black album playbacks and more announced for David Bowie Lightroom in London
item.description: 🌟 Step into the magical world of David Bowie at the Lightroom in London! Live shows and dark album playbacks await. 🎶✨ #DavidBowie #MusicMagic

item.title: Beyoncé Says Good ‘Morning’ With Surprise Song
item.description: 🌟 Rise and shine with Queen Bey's unexpected drop! 🎶☀️ Start your day right with new music vibes! 🎵 #Beyoncé #SurpriseDrop

item.title: Tyga Introduces New Artist Persona $TARFACE With ‘GAVE U RACKS’
item.description: 🌟 Meet Tyga's alter ego $TARFACE in his latest track 'GAVE U RACKS'! 💸✨ Let the money moves begin! 🎶 #Tyga #NewMusic

item.title: From ‘Royal Wedding’ Mugs to ‘Paper Rings,’ Taylor & Travis Wedding Merch Has Already Hit the Internet
item.description: 💍 Get ready to deck out your place with Taylor Swift and Travis Barker merch! 🎶 Wedding vibes are here! 👰🤵 #TaylorTravisWedding #MusicMerchMadness

item.title: The Cure play deep cuts and fan favourites during Open’er Festival 2026 headline set
item.description: 🎶 Dive into The Cure's dreamy set at Open'er Festival 2026! Deep cuts and fan favorites on full display! ✨ #TheCure #OpenErFestival

item.title: Michael Stipe & Brandi Carlile Cover Elvis Presley, Josh Homme Covers Tom Petty At Gansett Games
item.description: 🎶 Legends unite! Michael Stipe & Brandi Carlile sing Elvis, while Josh Homme rocks Tom Petty at Gansett Games! 🎸 #MusicLegends #GansettGames

item.title: Shakira Is Raising Money for Venezuela Through FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund
item.description: 🌟 Shakira using her star power for good! Let's shake it for a great cause 💃🎶 #MusicForACause #Shakira #FIFA #GlobalCitizen 🌍🎓

item.title: Jorja Smith Announces New Album What Are The Odds
item.description: 🎉 Exciting news alert 🚨 @JorjaSmith just dropped the bombshell - New Album "What Are The Odds" on the way! 🎶✨ #JorjaSmith #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Can This Cover of Taylor Swift’s ‘Love Story’ Break Mosh Pit Records?
item.description: 🎸 Rock on with this epic 'Love Story' cover! Prepare for some serious mosh pit action! 🤘 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Wilco and the Breeders Now Hold a Yo-Yo World Record
item.description: 🎸 Rock legends Wilco and The Breeders show off their skills with a new kind of record! 🪀 Who knew they were yo-yo pros? 🤯 #MusicNewsMaestros

item.title: YOSHIKI Unveils First Special Guest Jonathan Davis of Korn for Walt Disney Concert Hall Shows, July 16 & 17
item.description: 🎉 Exciting news alert! 🎶 @YoshikiOfficial brings the legendary Jonathan Davis of @Korn to Walt Disney Concert Hall! 🤘 #Yoshiki #JonathanDavis #Korn

item.title: Horse Feathers Announce Words Are Dead 20th Anniversary Reissue & Tour
item.description: 🎉 Just when you thought Words Are Dead couldn't get any better! @horsefeathersband is celebrating 20 years with a special reissue and tour! 🎶 #musicnews #anniversarytour

item.title: Tour news: Slippers, Spoon SummerStage afterparty, Lou Barlow’s 60th Birthday Party, more
item.description: Kick off your summer in style with these must-see music events! 🎉 Slippers, Spoon, and Lou Barlow know how to party! 🎶 #MusicNews

item.title: FKA Twigs Hosts a Rooftop Dance Battle With Lil Yachty in ‘On Your Mind’ Video
item.description: Rooftop dance-off alert! 🌟 FKA Twigs and Lil Yachty get groovy in 'On Your Mind' video. Who will take the crown? 👑💃 #MusicNews

item.title: Watch Hayley Williams cover Sinéad O’Connor’s “Mandinka” in Dublin
item.description: 🎤 Hayley Williams slays Sinéad O'Connor's "Mandinka" in Dublin! Watch now for chills and thrills! 🤘 #HayleyWilliams #CoverQueen

item.title: Angela Autumn Announces New Album Believer: Hear “Mountain Stream”
item.description: 🎶 Dive into Angela Autumn's magical world with her new album, 'Believer'! 🌿 Listen to the enchanting track "Mountain Stream" now! 🌟 #AngelaAutumn #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Hollywood Vampires Announce Live Album At Montreux Jazz Festival, Unleash “Raise the Dead”: Stream
item.description: 🦇🎶 Hollywood Vampires rock Montreux Jazz Fest with new live album release of "Raise the Dead"! Turn up the volume! 🤘 #HollywoodVampires #LiveMusic

item.title: Rush Postpone Two Shows After Geddy Lee Diagnosed With Laryngitis and Bronchitis
item.description: Sending healing vibes to Geddy Lee 🎸 Wishing for a speedy recovery so he can rock the stage again! 🤘 #GetWellSoonGeddy #RushFansUnite

item.title: Chris Brown Must Pay Housekeeper $13 Million Over Dog-Mauling Attack
item.description: 🐾 Chris Brown in the doghouse! Housekeeper wins big in legal battle. Woof! 🐶 #celebgossip #legalbeagle

item.title: Obsession, One of This Year’s Biggest Hits, Gets Its 4K Ultra HD Release
item.description: 🌟 Dance all night with the crystal-clear beats of 'Obsession' in 4K Ultra HD! 💿✨ #MusicNews #ObsessionUltraHD

item.title: Best July 4th Audio and Tech Deals Available Right Now
item.description: 🎶 Score sizzling July 4th deals on all things music tech! Time to upgrade your sound game 🔊💥 #MusicTechDeals #July4thSales

item.title: Joyeria Announce New Album Decay Decay Decay: Hear “Duller Grey”
item.description: 🎶 Dive into the mesmerizing sounds of Joyeria's latest album, Decay Decay Decay! 🌟 Listen to their new track "Duller Grey" now! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert
